how_to_use: high_value_gaps = patterns competitors use with high engagement that this account hasn't tried. unique_to_this_account = this brand's differentiation moat. sector_pattern_overlap_score = how much of the sector playbook this account already covers (1.0 = full overlap). Use high_value_gaps for creative brief expansion. Use unique patterns for brand positioning.
